description: Style Note These ankle boots from woodland celebrate the true spirit of adventure and are designed for comfort under extreme conditions. Product Details High-top boots with a raised heel Four-hole lace ups with metal rings Padded tongue and insole for in-step comfort Rubber midsole TPU outsole with lugs and grooves Material and Care Nubuck Use a branded leather conditioner and polish on leather parts Use a suede brush to remove dist from suede parts Do not store in direct sunlight
